message:
feat(plan): add zombie and D-state process handling (sj6.1)

Implement special handling for unkillable process states in action
planning and execution:

Zombie (Z-state) handling:
- Detect zombies via ProcessState
- Route kill/restart actions to parent process instead of zombie
- Support ZombieToParent and ZombieInvestigateOnly routing
- Blocked actions never target zombie PIDs directly
- Track original zombie target for reporting

D-state (uninterruptible sleep) handling:
- Mark Kill/Restart actions as low-confidence for D-state processes
- Include diagnostics (wchan, I/O counters) in action plan
- Add VerifyProcessState precheck to block D-state signals
- Surface diagnostic info for debugging

Changes:
- Add process_state, parent_identity, d_state_diagnostics to DecisionCandidate
- Add ActionRouting, ActionConfidence, DStateDiagnostics types
- Add routing, confidence, original_zombie_target, d_state_diagnostics to PlanAction
- Add PreCheck::VerifyProcessState for state verification
- Implement check_process_state() in LivePreCheckProvider
- Update generate_plan() to handle special process states
- Add plan_zombie_actions() helper for zombie routing
- Add 8 unit tests for zombie and D-state behavior

Acceptance criteria met:
- Zombie targets never receive direct kill action
- Zombie handling routes to parent with clear rationale
- D-state targets get low-confidence flag and diagnostics
- State verification precheck blocks signals to Z/D processes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
